text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's been hours since arriving at this mystery location with Gold Ship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooshhh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhh, I feel reborn... The sweet hydration is spreading through my
whole body...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Has me thinking... Y'know when dried seaweed is rehydrated? I
wonder if it feels just like this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, we're just relaxing here, sipping on the juice from
the coconut Gold Ship split with her bare hands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the waves, together with the sweet coconut water, really
helps with my fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's kind of strange, but I feel like I could do this forever...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heh... Looks like you're finally starting to loosen up.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ain't this great? Sometimes you just gotta take the time to do nothing
at all.
choice_data_list: Do you spend a lot of time relaxing like this?
Do you spend a lot of time relaxing like this?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sure, when I need to. They do say every warrior has their resting
place.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Warrior in this case being a figure of speech for an Umamusume racer.
Or if you wanna be real slick, I used a "metaphor."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: And how do I put this... There's no place hotter than a racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Even normally quiet Umamusume show their true natures during a
race.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Everyone gives it their all, and that's when I can really let loose. I feel
my body burn so hot that I get this huge relief from it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yup, even if you made me choose between racing and catching toads,
I'd choose racing every time.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: And this place... I can really relax here, yup...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooshhh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That sound of the waves crashing... Hear it? That's the real beauty of
nature...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooshhh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahh... So therapeutic... Spending my life here wouldn't be bad at all...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahhhh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aaahhh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: AAAAGHHH!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hoooly smokes! I finally feel it—the burnin' frustration!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
When you dance away from the pressure of the race and spend too
much time restin'! The pent-up hunger to race!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It's the impulse that drives us! The fire! The burning! The explosion!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: This is it! This is the hunger that I've been starving to get!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What're you waiting for, Trainer?! We're going home—right now!
choice_data_list: What the heck is going on?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Weren't you listening? We've done what we came to do. Time to go
back!
choice_data_list: But I don't know what we came here for!
But I don't know what we came here for!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Geez, can you get any slower? What are you, a snail? From Planet of
the Snails?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If I don't burn with hunger before a race, I won't get hot enough to
run!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Now though? It's perfect. I'm absolutely dying to run!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Good thing too, my race is tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait... I didn't tell ya?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wow, sorry 'bout that. ☆ Turns out my debut race is tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You and the whole country'll be in tears after you witness my dazzling
moves! Woooo! I'm on fire!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So, let's hit the road! And no, you can't take the coconut! Dispose of
it properly in the sand!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now where's home... Not a clue, but that way looks promising!
Coming? You better keep up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just when I was starting to figure out this treasure hunt, it's time to go back... To be continued
